description:
h2. Epic Goal
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* to capture, classify and correlate field-reported issues and promote real ones to CRA reports,
*so that* post-market signals are tracked and the incident-relevant ones flow into Art. 14 rather than being lost.

h3. Scope
CRA Art. 16 post-market monitoring: field-issue intake + schema; incident/non-incident classification; product/version/SBOM correlation; status workflow with promote-to-CRA-report.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/field-issues.test.ts}}, *when* run, *then* 33 tests pass.
* *Given* an incident-classified issue, *when* promoted, *then* a CRA Art. 14 report is created.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-237 P1 intake+schema
* CRAN-238 P2 classification
* CRAN-239 P3 product/version correlation
* CRAN-240 P4 workflow + CRA-report link

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* support engineer,
*I want* to log field-reported issues against a product,
*so that* post-market signals are captured in one place.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{pool.ts initDb()}}, *then* {{field_issues (org_id, product_id, status, classified_as)}} exists.
* *Given* {{routes/field-issues.test.ts}}, *then* Phase-1 tests pass.

h3. Implementation Notes
Intake endpoint + basic UI.

h3. Sources
#46 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* compliance officer,
*I want* field issues classified as incident vs non-incident,
*so that* only incident-relevant issues drive Art. 14 attention.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/field-issues.test.ts}}, *then* classification transitions are covered.

h3. Implementation Notes
Incident (Art. 14) vs quality/UX/feature.

h3. Sources
#46 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* compliance officer,
*I want* each field issue correlated to a product + version + SBOM snapshot,
*so that* a reported vuln pattern can be matched to the dependency tree.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* a field issue, *then* it links to {{product_id}}, version and a snapshot.

h3. Implementation Notes
Correlation for vuln-pattern matching.

h3. Sources
#46 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* compliance officer,
*I want* a full status workflow with promote-to-CRA-report,
*so that* an incident-classified field issue becomes an Art. 14 report in one step.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/field-issues.test.ts}}, *then* 33 tests pass.
* *Given* {{POST /api/field-issues/:id/promote-to-cra-report}}, *then* the promote flow is verified.

h3. Implementation Notes
open/triaging/classified/linked/closed.

h3. Sources
#46 Phase 4 commits.

h2. Epic Goal
*As a* manufacturer of an Important-II / Critical product,
*I want* a Notified Body directory plus per-product assessment tracking,
*so that* I can choose an NB and manage the whole engagement from application to certificate in one place.

h3. Scope
EU-register-seeded NB directory; per-product NB assessment records; milestones + correspondence; outcome storage + UI.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/notified-bodies.test.ts}} + {{nb-assessment.test.ts}}, *then* 54 tests pass.
* *Given* an assessment, *then* its milestones + correspondence + outcome are tracked.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-241 P1 directory seed
* CRAN-242 P2 assessment record
* CRAN-243 P3 milestones + correspondence
* CRAN-244 P4 outcome + UI

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* a seeded Notified Body directory,
*so that* I can find an NB by number, country and scope.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/notified-bodies.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.
* *Given* a fresh init, *then* seed rows >0.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{notified_bodies}} from the EU register.

h3. Sources
#48 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* a per-product NB assessment record,
*so that* I can track which NB I applied to and where the application stands.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/nb-assessment.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{nb_assessments}}: NB, application date/ref, status.

h3. Sources
#48 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* milestones and a correspondence log per assessment,
*so that* the NB engagement has a complete audit trail.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* an assessment, *then* {{nb_assessments.milestones}} + {{nb_correspondence}} populate.

h3. Implementation Notes
submitted/accepted/pre-audit/audit/cert-issued/renewed.

h3. Sources
#48 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* the assessment outcome stored with a timeline UI,
*so that* I have the certificate/decision/expiry recorded and visible.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{notified-bodies.test.ts}} + {{nb-assessment.test.ts}}, *then* 54 tests pass.
* *Given* the UI, *then* it surfaces the timeline + outcome.

h3. Implementation Notes
certificate/decision/expiry/scope-limitations.

h3. Sources
#48 Phase 4 commits.

h2. Epic Goal
*As a* manufacturer marketing across the EU,
*I want* to register with market-surveillance authorities per Member State and track status,
*so that* I meet my Art. 20 registration duty in each jurisdiction and can see status across all products.

h3. Scope
Registration schema + Member State / SPOC directory; per-jurisdiction registration; status workflow + correspondence + renewal flags; per-product UI + cross-product matrix.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/market-surveillance.test.ts}} + {{ms-registration.test.ts}}, *then* 40 tests pass.
* *Given* a registration approaching expiry, *then* a renewal notification fires.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-245 P1 schema + MS directory
* CRAN-246 P2 per-jurisdiction registration
* CRAN-247 P3 status + correspondence
* CRAN-248 P4 UI + overview

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* a registration schema and Member State contact directory,
*so that* I know where and how to register in each jurisdiction.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/market-surveillance.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.

h3. Implementation Notes
Per-org/per-jurisdiction rows; MS contact points + SPOCs.

h3. Sources
#49 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* to register per Member State where I market a product,
*so that* each jurisdiction's registration is recorded with status.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/ms-registration.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.

h3. Implementation Notes
reference/contact/jurisdiction/status pending|confirmed|rejected.

h3. Sources
#49 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* status transitions, correspondence and renewal flagging per jurisdiction,
*so that* I'm warned before a registration lapses.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* a registration nearing expiry, *then* a renewal flag triggers a notification.

h3. Implementation Notes
Per-jurisdiction correspondence log.

h3. Sources
#49 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* manufacturer,
*I want* a per-product UI and cross-product registration matrix,
*so that* I can see registration status across every product and jurisdiction.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{market-surveillance.test.ts}} + {{ms-registration.test.ts}}, *then* 40 tests pass.

h3. Implementation Notes
Cross-product matrix.

h3. Sources
#49 Phase 4 commits.

h2. Epic Goal
*As a* NIS2-relevant entity,
*I want* a supplier risk register with criticality, treatments and evidence,
*so that* I can discharge the NIS2 Art. 21(2)(d) supply-chain risk-management duty with an auditable register.

h3. Scope
Supplier registry + schema; criticality classification with rationale; per-supplier risk-treatment log; evidence attachment + Markdown report export.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/supply-chain-risk.test.ts}}, *when* run, *then* 8 tests pass.
* *Given* a supplier, *then* criticality + risk treatments + evidence are recorded.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-249 P1 registry+schema
* CRAN-250 P2 criticality
* CRAN-251 P3 risk-treatment log
* CRAN-252 P4 evidence + export

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* NIS2 entity,
*I want* a per-org supplier registry,
*so that* I have a single inventory of my suppliers and when each was last assessed.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/supply-chain-risk.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.
* *Given* the schema, *then* a {{suppliers}} table exists.

h3. Implementation Notes
name/service/criticality/contact/last-assessed.

h3. Sources
#51 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* NIS2 entity,
*I want* each supplier classified by criticality with a rationale,
*so that* I focus risk effort on the suppliers that matter most.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* a save, *then* criticality (critical/important/standard) + rationale are required.

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
#51 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* NIS2 entity,
*I want* a per-supplier risk-treatment log,
*so that* each identified risk has an owner, treatment and due date.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* a supplier, *then* the risk-treatment log is visible.

h3. Implementation Notes
accept/mitigate/transfer/avoid + owner + due + status.

h3. Sources
#51 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* NIS2 entity,
*I want* evidence attachment and a register export,
*so that* I can hand an auditor the supply-chain risk register with supporting evidence.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/supply-chain-risk.test.ts}}, *then* 8 tests pass.

h3. Implementation Notes
Markdown export.

h3. Sources
#51 Phase 4 commits.

h2. Epic Goal
*As a* incident-response lead,
*I want* an internal incident lifecycle distinct from external CRA reporting,
*so that* my team can run an incident through detect→recover→post-mortem with RACI, evidence and a timeline export.

h3. Scope
Incident schema + intake; workflow stages (detect/contain/eradicate/recover/post-mortem); RACI + evidence attachments; Markdown timeline export.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/incidents.test.ts}}, *when* run, *then* 33 tests pass.
* *Given* the stages, *then* transitions are enforced (no recover before contain).

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-253 P1 schema+intake
* CRAN-254 P2 workflow stages
* CRAN-255 P3 RACI + evidence
* CRAN-256 P4 timeline export

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* incident-response lead,
*I want* an internal incident record and intake,
*so that* org-internal incidents are tracked separately from external Art. 14 reports.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/incidents.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{incidents}} schema.

h3. Sources
#52 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* incident-response lead,
*I want* staged incident workflow,
*so that* the team follows detect→contain→eradicate→recover→post-mortem in order.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the stages, *then* transitions are enforced (cannot recover before contain).

h3. Implementation Notes
Each stage: owner/started/completed/summary.

h3. Sources
#52 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* incident-response lead,
*I want* RACI assignments and per-stage evidence,
*so that* responsibilities and supporting evidence are recorded.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* RACI roles, *then* they are selectable from a per-org list.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{incident_responders}} join table.

h3. Sources
#52 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* incident-response lead,
*I want* a Markdown incident-timeline export,
*so that* I can produce a complete post-incident record.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/incidents.test.ts}}, *then* 33 tests pass.
* *Given* help guide {{ch6_05}}, *then* it is complete with a Beck-map route.

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
#52 Phase 4 + session 58 help-guide rewrite.

h2. Epic Goal
*As a* engineer / compliance officer,
*I want* a crypto inventory with PQC-readiness classification per product,
*so that* I know which algorithms and libraries each product uses and how quantum-ready it is.

h3. Scope
Algorithm + library registries with deprecation + NIST PQC classification; per-product crypto-inventory entries; PQC readiness classification + score; Markdown report + admin registry editing.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{services/crypto-inventory.test.ts}} + {{routes/crypto-inventory.test.ts}}, *then* they pass.
* *Given* a product, *then* a deterministic PQC-readiness score is computed.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-257 P1 registries
* CRAN-258 P2 per-product entries
* CRAN-259 P3 readiness classification
* CRAN-260 P4 report + admin edit

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* platform operator,
*I want* seeded algorithm and library registries with deprecation/PQC classification,
*so that* the platform knows which crypto is deprecated and which is PQC.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{services/crypto-inventory.test.ts}}, *then* registries are covered + seeded.

h3. Implementation Notes
RSA-1024/SHA-1 deprecated; ML-DSA/ML-KEM/SLH-DSA PQC.

h3. Sources
#53 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* contributor,
*I want* to log my product's crypto libraries, algorithms and use-cases,
*so that* my product has a complete crypto inventory.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/crypto-inventory.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{crypto_inventory_entries}}.

h3. Sources
#53 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* compliance officer,
*I want* each inventory entry classified for PQC readiness,
*so that* I see a readiness score per product.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the entries, *then* a deterministic readiness score is computed.

h3. Implementation Notes
PQC-ready / classical-but-secure / deprecated.

h3. Sources
#53 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* compliance officer,
*I want* a crypto report export and admin registry editing,
*so that* I can export the inventory and keep the registries current.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the report, *then* it generates with the full inventory + readiness summary.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{/admin/crypto-inventory}}; help guide {{ch6_04}} uses CRANIS2 as the PQC example.

h3. Sources
#53 Phase 4 commits.

h2. Epic Goal
*As a* OSS maintainer or non-profit,
*I want* a verification path to free CRANIS2 access,
*so that* trusted OSS stewards and non-profits can use the platform without the contributor-based fee.

h3. Scope
Verification schema + lifecycle; self-service application + evidence intake; admin review; free-access billing entitlement; annual renewal cadence; UI + tests.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/nonprofit-verification.test.ts}}, *when* run, *then* it passes.
* *Given* an approved org, *then* it bypasses the billing gate; *given* expiry-30d, *then* a renewal notice fires.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-261 P1 verification schema
* CRAN-262 P2 application + evidence
* CRAN-263 P3 admin review
* CRAN-264 P4 free-access entitlement
* CRAN-265 P5 renewal cadence
* CRAN-266 P6 UI + tests

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* platform operator,
*I want* a verification schema with a status lifecycle,
*so that* applications move through a clear review lifecycle.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{routes/nonprofit-verification.test.ts}}, *then* it passes.

h3. Implementation Notes
{{nonprofit_verifications}} + {{trusted_oss_orgs}}; requested/under_review/approved/rejected/revoked.

h3. Sources
#58 Phase 1 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* OSS maintainer / non-profit,
*I want* a self-service application with evidence intake,
*so that* I can apply and submit proof of OSS-stewardship or charity status.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the application form, *then* it captures all evidence fields.

h3. Implementation Notes
GitHub org link / OSS-stewardship attestation; charity-register lookup.

h3. Sources
#58 Phase 2 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* platform admin,
*I want* to approve, reject or revoke verifications with an audit trail,
*so that* decisions are deliberate and recorded with a reason.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the approve/reject endpoints, *then* they are {{requirePlatformAdmin}}-gated.

h3. Implementation Notes
Audit-logged decision + reason.

h3. Sources
#58 Phase 3 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* approved OSS/non-profit org,
*I want* a free-access entitlement that overrides billing,
*so that* my approved org isn't charged the contributor fee.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* an approved org, *then* it bypasses the billing gate.

h3. Implementation Notes
Entitlement honoured by the billing gate.

h3. Sources
#58 Phase 4 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* platform operator,
*I want* an annual renewal cadence with advance notice,
*so that* entitlements stay current and orgs are warned before expiry.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* expiry minus 30 days, *then* a renewal-due notification fires.

h3. Implementation Notes
Re-verify evidence annually.

h3. Sources
#58 Phase 5 commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* applicant / admin,
*I want* the verification UI and full test coverage,
*so that* the whole flow is usable end-to-end and verified.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the UI, *then* application + admin review render; *given* the suite, *then* the verification tests pass.

h3. Implementation Notes
Phase 6 consolidation.

h3. Sources
#58 Phase 6 commits.
